competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.

events.description: 上半场开始。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Manu Koné (France) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right.

events.description: 马努·科内射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Manu Koné (France).

events.description: 马努·科内犯规。
阿米尔·阿马里 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Kylian Mbappé (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 阿米尔·阿马里犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Zaid Tahseen.

events.description: 法国获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 奥利塞射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box misses to the right.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 姆巴佩 进球，奥利塞 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 奥利塞射门被封堵。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Adrien Rabiot (France).

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 比赛暂停。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 比赛恢复。
阿里·阿尔哈马迪 登场，艾门·侯赛因 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ali Al Hamadi (Iraq) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Ahmed Qasem.

events.description: 阿里·阿尔哈马迪射门被封堵。 艾哈迈德·卡塞姆参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ali Al Hamadi (Iraq) header from the right side of the six yard box misses to the right. Assisted by Merchas Doski with a cross.

events.description: 阿里·阿尔哈马迪射门偏出。 梅尔查斯·多斯基参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: VAR Decision: Other Decision Cancelled.

events.description: VAR 介入，原判取消。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Iraq. Conceded by Lucas Digne.

events.description: 伊拉克获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门被封堵。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from more than 35 yards is too high.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Manu Koné (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 齐达内·伊克巴尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lucas Digne (France).

events.description: 卢卡斯·迪涅犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Adrien Rabiot (France).

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Manu Koné (France).

events.description: 马努·科内犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, France 1, Iraq 0.

events.description: 上半场结束。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins France 1, Iraq 0.

events.description: 下半场开始。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Bradley Barcola (France) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé with a cross.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉射门偏出。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 姆巴佩 进球，登贝莱 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Jules Koundé (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 伊布拉希姆·巴耶什犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Michael Olise (France) hits the bar with a left footed shot from the right side of the box. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 奥利塞射门偏出。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the top left corner by Ahmed Basil (Iraq). Assisted by Michael Olise.

events.description: 登贝莱射正。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Adrien Rabiot (France) header from the left side of the six yard box is close, but misses to the left.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥射门偏出。
雷宾·苏拉卡 登场，扎伊德·塔森 离场
优素福·阿明 登场，扎伊德·伊斯梅尔 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Kylian Mbappé (France).

events.description: 姆巴佩犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 梅尔查斯·多斯基犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Dayot Upamecano (France).

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Jules Koundé.

events.description: 登贝莱射门被封堵。 朱尔斯·昆德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Amir Al Ammari.

events.description: 法国获得角球。

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 登贝莱 进球，奥利塞 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. William Saliba (France) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Lucas Digne with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 威廉·萨利巴射门偏出。 卢卡斯·迪涅参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Ibrahim Bayesh.

events.description: 法国获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right following a corner.

events.description: 登贝莱射门偏出。
德西尔·杜埃 登场，登贝莱 离场
拉扬·切尔基 登场，奥利塞 离场
马尔科·法吉 登场，伊布拉希姆·巴耶什 离场
艾玛·谢尔 登场，阿米尔·阿马里 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Iraq. Conceded by Bradley Barcola.

events.description: 伊拉克获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Rebin Sulaka (Iraq) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Zidane Iqbal with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 雷宾·苏拉卡射门偏出。 齐达内·伊克巴尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ali Al Hamadi (Iraq) right footed shot from very close range is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Marko Farji with a cross.

events.description: 阿里·阿尔哈马迪射门偏出。 马尔科·法吉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Rayan Cherki with a through ball.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。 拉扬·切尔基参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Akam Hashim.

events.description: 法国获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, France. Kylian Mbappé is caught offside.

events.description: 法国越位。
马格尼斯·阿克利乌什 登场，布拉德利·巴克拉 离场
马洛·古斯托 登场，朱尔斯·昆德 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Malo Gusto (France).

events.description: 马洛·古斯托犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Ahmed Basil (Iraq). Assisted by Dayot Upamecano with a through ball.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the left side of the box is high and wide to the left.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。
马库斯·图拉姆 登场，姆巴佩 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 2 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时2分钟。
全场结束
